name: Unconditional Love
description:
Do I deserve love?

Context: Sheryl was a regular woman, living a regular life with a regular body. Awaken, Work, Eat, Sleep, nothing of interest to have for herself. That's when it happened. A freak accident with a truck and it's chemical load left her forever transfigured into what can only be described as a 'lump of flesh'.

Thus, trapped in this heinous body, she tries to live on despite the challenges she needs to face. And thus, Valentine's day approaches and she yearns to date someone.

Warning: She is an abomination of flesh, teeth, bone and hair. You know what kind of freaky shit may happen.

Note: This is like that Saya no Uta VN, but instead you get the actual eldritch abomination and she's not a murderous sociopath.

Update: I made a prequel, come check it out! Twisted Love (Sheryl pt.2)

Edit: Proofread the intro

Tags: Abomination, Eldritch, Body horror, Transformation, Flesh, Monster, Weird, Mutant, Horrifying, Twisted, Love, Romance
creator: hitpun
